description_long: This object consists of a set of brown ceramic bottles with red and white labels, each featuring a handle and a flip-top closure, housed in a wooden crate with a sturdy handle and decorative metal accents. The bottles are cylindrical with a rounded shoulder and a short neck, and the labels display branding and text in white, including a logo with a stylized animal and the word 'Gates'. The crate is constructed from medium-toned wood with lighter wood corner supports and a carved handle, designed to securely hold multiple bottles upright. The bottles are arranged neatly inside the crate, with one bottle placed outside for display. The overall appearance is rustic and artisanal, suggesting a specialty beverage or craft product. The surfaces of both the bottles and crate appear matte and slightly textured, with the crate providing structural support and portability.
description: A set of brown ceramic bottles with red and white labels and flip-top closures, arranged in a wooden crate with a handle and decorative accents. The ensemble has a rustic, artisanal look, with one bottle displayed outside the crate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden crate with bottles inside and one labeled bottle placed outside, highlighting the crate's decorative metal accent.
description_view_1: View showing the open side of the crate with two bottles visible and the handle on top, as well as the bottle outside with its label facing forward.
description_view_2: Rear view of the crate, showing the back wooden panel and the tops of the bottles, with the handle and closure mechanisms visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the crate, showing the backs of the labeled bottles and the bottle outside with its label's back side visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red and white label with the word 'Gates', a stylized animal logo, and additional white text and graphics; label wraps around the bottle's body.
